about.heading: A COACH-LED COMMUNITY BUILT FOR SERIOUS, SUSTAINABLE PROGRESS.

pillar1.title: Real community
pillar1.text: A welcoming room where members push each other. You'll know names by your second week.

pillar2.title: Structured training
pillar2.text: In-house programming with a CrossFit-dominated schedule, so every session has a purpose.

pillar3.title: Expert coaching
pillar3.text: Qualified instructors lead every class with hands-on, interactive coaching — technique first, intensity second.

pillar4.title: Premium facilities
pillar4.text: Top-quality equipment, open-gym access and a private recovery suite — sauna, cold plunge and physio.

offers.heading: Programmes for every stage of your training.

card1.title: CrossFit classes
card1.text: Coach-led, varied daily workouts on an in-house programme. Scaled for every ability.

card2.title: Open gym
card2.text: Train on your own schedule with full access to top-quality equipment and floor space.

card3.title: Competitor training
card3.text: Focused programming and coaching for members chasing the competition floor.

card4.title: Recovery services
card4.text: A private recovery suite with a infrared sauna, cold plunge, and in-house physio & massage — recover as seriously as you train.

faq.q1: Do I need to be fit before I start?
faq.a1: No. Every class is scaled to you, and a £1 trial week is the easiest way to find your feet.
faq.a2: Choose unlimited Affiliate, a rolling 4-weekly Foundation plan, or a one-off class pass. All sign-ups run through WodBoard.
faq.q3: What should I bring to class?
faq.a3: Trainers, comfortable kit, and a water bottle. Everything else — equipment and recovery — is here.
faq.q4: Can I just try it first?
faq.a4: Yes — start with a trial week. £1, no commitment, just turn up and train.

stories.heading: Results you can feel — and a room that has your back.

story1.quote: "Can’t recommend the place enough, great facility, great group. 5 Stars"
story1.name: Conor D.

story2.quote: "LOVE TBB, the space, the people, the coaches, the vibe. Everyone is so supportive and friendly. Coaches have a great way of encouraging you to push past your comfort zone without making you do anything you don’t feel comfortable with. A place for everyone. Post team work out coffees and chats also a personal fav."
story2.name: Madeline L.

story3.quote: "I joined CrossFit TBB 3 years ago and it has been amazing. The coaching is great, the classes are super challenging and so much fun. There's such a supportive community, especially a great group of girls who make training even more enjoyable. Couldn't recommend it enough!"
story3.name: Rebecca P.

cta.headline: Come and find out what you're capable of.
cta.lede: Coach-led CrossFit for every level, in East Belfast. Start with a £1 trial week — no experience needed, no pressure, just good training.
